Objects.Name: [Module] Honeyhive -- Giant Wood Windmill
Objects.Notes: A giant wood windmill with four platforms that move along with the rotating frame.

Classes.Name: WatchTowerRotateStep
Classes.Notes: A large rotating windmill with four platforms that move along with the windmill's frame. Unlike SMG1, the rotation speed can be changed through Obj_args now. It is also compatible with an optional cutscene setup.

Obj_arg0.Name: Speed
Obj_arg0.Description: The rate at which it rotates. Default is 300.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.

DemoCast.Description: Can take part in a cutscene. Its cutscene nerve action will make it start moving.
